title: The Occasion of Ja'far 's Becoming Caliph and the Period of His Caliphate
description: Period of His Caliphate I was informed by more than one authority that when al-Wathiq died Ahmad b. Abi Du'ad, Itakh, Waif, 'Umar b. Faraj, Ibn alZayyat, and Ahmad b. Khalid Abu al-Wazir were present in his

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 34
